title: JNPT Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Deputy General Manager Posts
description: The Jawaharlal Nehru Port Authority (JNPT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Deputy General Manager Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree can apply for the JNPT Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, sal...
